name: PureSnap
tagline: TikTok / YouTube / Instagram / Twitter Video Downloader — No Watermark
description: All-in-one no-watermark video downloader. Save videos, images, and audio from TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X, Bilibili, Facebook, Reddit, Xiaohongshu, Sora2, and 999+ platforms. Built-in API key, zero config — install and download immediately. Supports multi-resolution (up to 8K), subtitle extraction, playlist batch download, and Sora2 watermark removal.
